domain: textile factory automation, garment handling conveyors, fabric cutting tables, and apparel production fixtures

ideas.product_context: A textile factory station where bundled cut pieces move between sewing preparation and assembly cells.
ideas.core_function: Carries soft stacked garment bundles while keeping their orientation controlled during handoff.
ideas.likely_main_part: modular conveyor bed with side guide rails and bundle support paddles
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Soft goods support, repeating conveyor elements, guide clearances, and transfer interfaces create a mix of rigid machine geometry and fabric-handling intent.

ideas.product_context: An apparel production overhead line that routes hanging work-in-progress garments to different finishing areas.
ideas.core_function: Switches suspended hangers from one rail path to another without dropping or twisting garments.
ideas.likely_main_part: pivoting rail switch body with hanger capture throat
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Curved rail paths, pivot zones, suspended load clearance, and fail-safe capture surfaces challenge spatial reasoning without relying on simple block shapes.

ideas.product_context: A cutting room setup where fabric rolls are staged before spreading onto an automated cutting table.
ideas.core_function: Supports and aligns a fabric roll so it can unwind smoothly into downstream spreading equipment.
ideas.likely_main_part: angled cradle frame with roller supports and adjustable end stops
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Cylindrical roll support, tangential contact surfaces, adjustable stops, and ergonomic loading access require clear representation of motion and contact.

ideas.product_context: A post-cutting table station that sorts fabric panels by garment operation before sewing.
ideas.core_function: Presents labeled compartments for operators or automation to place cut panels into production sequence.
ideas.likely_main_part: rotating compartment tray with low-friction panel shelves
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Radial organization, shallow sheet support, compartment labeling zones, and operator access envelopes test non-rectangular fixture layout.

ideas.product_context: A sewing preparation cell handling small shaped collar components before stitching.
ideas.core_function: Holds flexible collar pieces in repeatable positions for pickup, inspection, or robotic loading.
ideas.likely_main_part: contoured nesting tray with shallow fabric registration pockets
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Irregular fabric outlines, shallow retaining lips, pickup reliefs, and mirrored part variants require shape-aware fixture modeling.

ideas.product_context: A semi-automated apparel line where sleeve panels must be presented consistently to an operator or robot.
ideas.core_function: Keeps sleeve fabric flattened and clocked to a repeatable sewing orientation.
ideas.likely_main_part: flat fixture plate with curved edge locators and gentle hold-down fingers
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The design mixes flat textile support, asymmetrical curved references, compliant holding features, and open access for sewing operations.

ideas.product_context: A fabric handling conveyor feeding cloth into inspection, spreading, or cutting equipment.
ideas.core_function: Guides a moving fabric edge while allowing sensor-based alignment corrections.
ideas.likely_main_part: belt conveyor frame with edge guide channel and sensor mounting rail
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Long thin belt surfaces, adjustable sensor brackets, edge-path geometry, and textile clearance constraints stress both layout and assembly representation.

ideas.product_context: A robotic cutting-room cell that lifts individual cut fabric pieces from a cutting table.
ideas.core_function: Provides distributed suction and edge relief for lifting soft fabric panels without folding them.
ideas.likely_main_part: perforated pickup plate with gasket zones and flexible skirt features
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Perforation fields, gasket outlines, soft-contact boundaries, and part-specific reliefs test repeated details and functional surface definition.

ideas.product_context: An apparel assembly station where fabric subassemblies need controlled flipping between operations.
ideas.core_function: Captures a partially sewn piece and turns it over while preserving alignment.
ideas.likely_main_part: hinged clamshell frame with fabric capture ribs
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Hinged motion, open-frame construction, fabric clamping regions, and collision-free flip clearance create a demanding mechanical layout.

ideas.product_context: An automated cutting table where offcuts and trim pieces must be removed from the work surface.
ideas.core_function: Collects loose fabric scrap near the table edge while leaving the cutting surface unobstructed.
ideas.likely_main_part: sloped trough assembly with removable collection bin
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Angled sheet-metal surfaces, removable container interfaces, table-edge mounting, and textile debris flow need careful assembly relationships.

ideas.product_context: A sewing line workstation for positioning labels or care tags before attachment.
ideas.core_function: Locates a tag relative to a fabric edge and holds it flat for stitching or heat bonding.
ideas.likely_main_part: small registration jig with fabric edge fence and tag pocket
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tiny flat components, shallow pockets, fold-clearance features, and operator finger access test precision fixture communication.

ideas.product_context: A trouser or skirt production line preparing belt loops for repeatable attachment.
ideas.core_function: Stages folded loop strips in consistent positions for automated pickup or operator sewing.
ideas.likely_main_part: indexed fixture plate with parallel loop channels and retention clips
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Repeating narrow channels, flexible strip containment, pickup clearances, and anti-twist geometry make the part more than a simple tray.

ideas.product_context: A cutting room process that stacks multiple fabric plies before precision cutting.
ideas.core_function: References the ply stack edge and keeps layers registered during transfer or pre-cut setup.
ideas.likely_main_part: removable alignment bar with retractable locating pins
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Retracting features, textile-safe pin tips, removable mounting, and long-edge registration require mechanism and fixture detail together.

ideas.product_context: A work-in-progress staging area where cut bundles need compact storage without losing sequence.
ideas.core_function: Applies light compression to fabric bundles while keeping tickets and layers accessible.
ideas.likely_main_part: spring-loaded shelf frame with floating pressure plate
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Moving compression surfaces, soft-stack clearance, label access windows, and adjustable force components test functional assembly reasoning.

ideas.product_context: An automated sewing cell feeding garment edges into a hemming station.
ideas.core_function: Forms and guides a fabric edge into a consistent hem path before stitching.
ideas.likely_main_part: curved folding guide with entry flare and stitch-path exit throat
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Developable guide surfaces, fabric fold path, narrow exit geometry, and machine clearance make it difficult to capture with basic primitives.

ideas.product_context: A flexible sewing automation line that swaps fixtures for different garment styles.
ideas.core_function: Provides repeatable mechanical mounting and service routing for removable apparel fixtures.
ideas.likely_main_part: baseplate with locating bushings, latch pockets, and utility pass-throughs
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Datum structures, quick-change latch geometry, cable or vacuum routing, and modular fixture boundaries test parametric assembly organization.

ideas.product_context: A fabric spreading table that anchors the leading edge of fabric during spreading passes.
ideas.core_function: Grips the fabric edge evenly while allowing quick release after the lay is formed.
ideas.likely_main_part: clamping rail with padded jaw and release linkage
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Long clamping contact, compliant pads, linkage motion, and fabric-safe jaw profiles combine mechanical and textile-specific features.

ideas.product_context: An apparel sewing cell that positions pockets on panels before stitching.
ideas.core_function: References the garment panel and outlines the pocket placement zone for repeatable attachment.
ideas.likely_main_part: transparent or open-frame template with shaped pocket window
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Nested outlines, open-frame visibility, asymmetrical placement features, and removable clamps test representation of negative space and layout references.

ideas.product_context: A garment handling line where tubular fabric sections need turning before finishing.
ideas.core_function: Receives a sleeve or similar tube and assists inversion while transferring it onward.
ideas.likely_main_part: tapered turning mandrel integrated with a short conveyor section
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tapered fabric-contact geometry, moving transfer surfaces, open access zones, and soft part inversion are hard to describe as static blocks.

ideas.product_context: A quality station checking cut textile panels for edge defects before assembly.
ideas.core_function: Holds flexible panels open and backlit so edge condition can be viewed or scanned.
ideas.likely_main_part: slanted inspection frame with translucent support surface and edge clamps
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Transparent support intent, illumination zones, gentle clamps, and panel viewing angles test material and functional annotation in CAD.

ideas.product_context: A finishing line where garments are transferred from a conveyor or workstation onto hangers.
ideas.core_function: Guides fabric shoulders toward a hanger while preventing snags or misloads.
ideas.likely_main_part: smooth funnel-shaped guide frame with hanger rail interface
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Swept guide surfaces, snag-free radii, rail alignment, and garment drape clearance challenge smooth geometric representation.

ideas.product_context: An apparel assembly machine feeding zipper tape into a sewing or attachment process.
ideas.core_function: Organizes zipper tape path and presents it at a stable angle for stitching.
ideas.likely_main_part: removable feed cassette with tape channel and guide rollers
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Flexible strip routing, roller contact, removable cassette datums, and sewing-machine clearance require precise path-based modeling.

ideas.product_context: A shirt production workstation preparing plackets for buttonhole or button attachment.
ideas.core_function: Supports layered fabric plackets flat while aligning them to machine tooling.
ideas.likely_main_part: flat support fixture with raised placket fence and tool access slots
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Layered fabric thickness intent, slots for tooling, raised registration edges, and operator loading reliefs test detailed fixture semantics.

ideas.product_context: A fabric preparation line that trims or handles selvage edges before cutting.
ideas.core_function: Maintains the fabric edge path and guides trimmed waste into a controlled collection route.
ideas.likely_main_part: edge guide conveyor with trim chute and adjustable guide shoe
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Parallel fabric and waste paths, adjustable guide shoes, chute transitions, and tool clearance create complex but practical factory geometry.

ideas.product_context: An apparel decoration area loading fabric panels into embroidery hoops before stitching.
ideas.core_function: Centers and tensions fabric over a hoop while preserving access for closing the frame.
ideas.likely_main_part: nesting base with hoop locator ring and fabric tension fingers
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Concentric ring references, compliant tension features, fabric overhang zones, and hand access pockets test circular fixture logic.

ideas.product_context: A shirt or jacket line where cuffs are folded and prepared for attachment.
ideas.core_function: Guides cuff material through a controlled fold path and presents it to the sewing station.
ideas.likely_main_part: multi-surface folding guide with entry ramp and exit locator
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Fold progression, smooth guide surfaces, narrow textile path, and exit alignment require capturing functional geometry rather than only appearance.

ideas.product_context: An apparel handling cell moving semi-finished garments between parallel workstation lines.
ideas.core_function: Changes garment travel direction while maintaining bundle or hanger orientation.
ideas.likely_main_part: low-profile rotating conveyor platform with perimeter guides
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Rotational motion, conveyor continuity, soft item containment, and floor-level integration stress both mechanism and factory layout representation.

ideas.product_context: A manual and automated cutting room where pattern weights are staged near fabric lays.
ideas.core_function: Stores and presents fabric weights for quick placement without interfering with cutting workflow.
ideas.likely_main_part: angled rack with shaped weight pockets and table-edge mount
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Repeated pocket geometry, ergonomic reach orientation, removable weight clearances, and table mounting create a compact fixture representation challenge.

ideas.product_context: A robotic garment handling station moving fabric panels between conveyors and fixtures.
ideas.core_function: Slides beneath soft textile pieces and transfers them with minimal wrinkling.
ideas.likely_main_part: thin paddle plate with tapered leading edge and low-friction surface zones
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Very thin functional geometry, tapered insertion profile, surface zones, and textile interaction clearances test subtle but important CAD details.

ideas.product_context: A sewing line where each garment bundle travels with a process ticket and material samples.
ideas.core_function: Holds work tickets beside moving garment bundles without blocking fabric access.
ideas.likely_main_part: conveyor-side clip rail with flexible ticket retainers
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Small repeating clip features, document clearance, conveyor attachment, and operator readability angle require detailed accessory modeling.
